command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 38MgGCfAkTTcdrf.ae1ad98e5b22 --database JYruXSQahvP3cr6rPdjNhA --execute 
-- عرض الأعداد قبل الحذف
SELECT 'radcheck' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM radcheck
UNION ALL
SELECT 'radreply', COUNT(*) FROM radreply
UNION ALL
SELECT 'radusergroup', COUNT(*) FROM radusergroup;

-- حذف جميع السجلات
DELETE FROM radcheck;
DELETE FROM radreply;
DELETE FROM radusergroup;

-- التحقق بعد الحذف
SELECT 'radcheck' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM radcheck
UNION ALL
SELECT 'radreply', COUNT(*) FROM radreply
UNION ALL
SELECT 'radusergroup', COUNT(*) FROM radusergroup;
